/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/qisa_parser.dir/src/qisa_parser.cpp.o -o qisa_parser  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.0/lib/libLLVMCore.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.0/lib/libLLVMSupport.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.0/lib/libLLVMIRReader.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.0/lib/libLLVMAsmParser.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.0/lib/libLLVMBitReader.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.0/lib/libLLVMCore.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.0/lib/libLLVMBinaryFormat.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.0/lib/libLLVMRemarks.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.0/lib/libLLVMTargetParser.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.0/lib/libLLVMBitstreamReader.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.0/lib/libLLVMSupport.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.0/lib/libLLVMDemangle.a -lm /opt/homebrew/lib/libz3.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /opt/homebrew/lib/libzstd.dylib
